special_mechanics.name: Attack System
special_mechanics.description: Auto-attack removed from previous Ys games; player must manually push button to attack

special_mechanics.name: Side-Scrolling Platformer
special_mechanics.description: Shifted from top-down perspective to side-scrolling camera angle reminiscent of Zelda II: The Adventure of Link

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides genre classification and gameplay overview but no specific physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system details. All quantitative movement data undocumented.
